description:
Build an automation triggered by the 'dynamic menu' event from slack_bot (dynamic_menu_name=List of Office Locations, parameters=[
  {
    "control_type": "select",
    "label": "Output",
 ...).
Then:
- Try the following (continue via the error handler on failure):
  - workato_smart_list: query list (col_sep=comma, csv=false, headers=false, result_schema_json=[{"control_type":"text","label":"LOCATION NAME","name":"LOCA...).
  - lookup_table: get entries (lookup_table_id=1840254).
  - workato_custom_code: invoke custom ruby code (code_output_schema_json=[{"name":"statement","type":"string","optional":false,"contr..., name=INSERT Statement), using data from step 4.
  - workato_smart_list: query list (col_sep=comma, csv=false, headers=false, result_schema_json=[{"control_type":"text","label":"LOCATION NAME","name":"LOCA...), using data from step 5.
  - workato_smart_list: query list (col_sep=comma, csv=false, headers=false, result_schema_json=[{"control_type":"text","label":"LOCATION NAME","name":"LOCA...), using data from the trigger.
  - slack_bot: generate menu options (use_option_groups=false), using data from step 7 and the trigger.
  - On error:

Expected observable behavior on the provided fixture: no external writes - the run only reads (it must still complete with the same reads and no writes).
